rulings.Case Title: NAIFEH AZAR VS. MARTHA RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Joinder Of Party
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 4, 2019, Line 1. DEFENDANTS MARTHA RODRIGUEZ, PABLO RODRIGUEZ'S Motion For Order Compelling Joinder Of Party. Defendants' Motion for Order Compelling Joinder of Party is DENIED. Defendants have failed to demonstrate that co-owners are necessary (or indispensable) parties to the action under CCP §389. Accordingly, on the facts presented, Defendants have not shown a "substantial risk" of multiple or inconsistent liability. (Union Carbide Corp. v. Superior Court (1984) 36 Cal.3d 15, 21). Defendants cite no authority to support joinder under CCP §§ 378, 379, or 382. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHU LEUNG VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC ET AL

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal of entire action of all parties and all causes of action on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 4, 2019, Line 3. DEFENDANT BONNIE HAHN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LAN LE VS. JOSEPH TAYLOR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 4, 2019, Line 4. DEFENDANT DONNA TAYLOR'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. FAC alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Allegations in the complaint, as well as exhibits provided, are taken as true for the purposes of ruling on the demurrer. In the construction of a pleading, for the purpose of determining its effect, its allegations must be liberally construed, with a view to substantial justice between the parties. (CCP §452). Proof of Service is in compliance with CCP § 1162(3). =(501/CFH)
